positive_contracts_covered: Wave26 loop-profile registry and Wave27 frame-manifest and temporal-evidence reuse
deterministic global-palette GIF89a export with stable bytes
manifest-order normalization, exact frame timing, infinite loop, and transactional publication
alpha transparency preservation without reserved-index collision for opaque pixels
actual Pillow decode and RGBA load of every GIF frame
candidate GIF SHA256, byte count, dimensions, frame count, durations, loop count, and decoded-frame hash binding
deterministic decoded-pixel first-to-last technical seam metric
source-frame artifact hash, byte, dimension, timing, and sequence integrity
synthetic technical verification remains blocked and unpromotable
negative_contracts_covered: missing or tampered source artifacts, invalid containers, truncated GIF, and invalid LZW decode
unknown loop taxonomy and tampered source sequence binding
frame-count, dimension, duration, sub-10ms timing, and loop-count mismatch
permuted manifests normalize identically in exporter and certifier
boolean-only runtime or visual proof claims
runtime and visual proof artifact hash or source/candidate binding mismatch
synthetic inputs cannot claim runtime, visual, export certification, production proof, or promotion
production_happy_path_policy: A synthetic fixture must not set runtime, visual, final-export, certification, promotion, or production-proof flags true; a genuine production GIF packet is required.
